mechanism_narrative: Declining unemployment rate signals strengthening labor market and rising consumer confidence, which drives increased discretionary spending and corporate earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE at 5.0% as of Jan 2011 indicates post-recession labor recovery
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or forward returns show no significant positive correlation with month-over-month UNRATE declines (t-test p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Federal funds rate remains below 3.5% in an accommodative stance, signaling continued monetary support for equity valuations through lower discount rates and reduced refinancing costs for corporations, sustaining positive 60-day forward returns.
regime_hint: monetary accommodation cycle with rates below neutral
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60-day returns in > 55% of periods when FEDFUNDS < 3.5%, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales (RSAFS) combined with expanding housing starts (HOUST) indicates robust consumer and construction demand, signaling broad-based economic expansion that drives equity valuations higher over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS at 357013M and HOUST at 2004K as of Jan 2011
regime_hint: early-cycle expansion with synchronized demand growth
failure_condition: Joint signal (both RSAFS and HOUST rising) fails to predict positive returns in > 50% of triggered instances, or interaction Rank IC < 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production index (INDPRO) accelerates month-over-month, signaling strengthening manufacturing capacity utilization and supply-side momentum that supports corporate profit margins and equity returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO acceleration fails to predict positive 5-day returns in > 52% of instances, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment (PAYEMS) growth decelerates or turns negative while unemployment remains elevated, signaling labor market weakness that triggers equity risk-off positioning and negative 20-day forward returns.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS at 133786K and UNRATE at 5.0% as of Jan 2011
regime_hint: labor market stagnation with weak job creation
failure_condition: Joint signal (weak PAYEMS growth and elevated UNRATE) predicts negative returns in < 48% of triggered instances, or interaction Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price inflation (CPIAUCSL) accelerates above 2.5% year-over-year while the Federal Reserve maintains accommodative rates, creating expectations of future rate hikes that compress equity valuations and produce negative 60-day forward returns.
regime_hint: monetary policy lag with rising inflation pressures
failure_condition: Inflation-rate divergence signal predicts negative returns in < 45% of triggered instances, or interaction Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth (GDPC1) remains below 2.5% annualized rate, signaling sub-trend economic expansion that constrains corporate earnings growth and produces negative 60-day forward equity returns.
regime_hint: sub-trend growth regime with limited expansion momentum
failure_condition: Sub-trend GDP growth fails to predict negative returns in > 52% of instances, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) declines month-over-month while payroll employment (PAYEMS) stagnates, signaling synchronized supply and labor weakness that triggers equity selloffs and negative 20-day forward returns.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO month-over-month change < -0.2% AND PAYEMS month-over-month growth < 0.05%
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO at 119.657 and PAYEMS at 133786K as of Jan 2011
regime_hint: synchronized supply-labor contraction with recession risk
failure_condition: Joint supply-labor weakness signal predicts negative returns in < 50% of triggered instances, or interaction Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.
